name: Melissa Calero
narrative: Honors English Teacher at Austin Achieve Public Schools (Jul 2017-present), teaching Honors English 1 and 2 with prior Spanish III, Ethnic Studies II, and yearbook advising experience. Teach For America 2015 corps member and Spanish teacher at George Washington Community High School in Indianapolis Public Schools. Student teaching experience in Spain and Indiana. Bachelor's degree in Spanish Language Teacher Education with ENL license addition and Counseling minor from Indiana University Bloomington.
